name: chr2_2q33_q34_SD_block
description: 2q33-q34 SD-rich block containing the SATB2 region and nearby CASP10/CASP8 paralogs. Flanking SDs mediate the 2q33.1 microdeletion (Glass syndrome, SATB2).

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SDs of 50-100 kb at ~95% identity; intervening unique segment contains SATB2, FZD7, CASP8/10 paralog block.
